CustomField.formula:
IF( (YEAR(endDate__c) - YEAR(startDate__c)) > 0 && (MONTH(endDate__c) + (12 * (YEAR(endDate__c) - YEAR(startDate__c))) - MONTH(startDate__c)) >= 12, TEXT(FLOOR((MONTH(endDate__c) + (12 * (YEAR(endDate__c) - YEAR(startDate__c))) - MONTH(startDate__c)) / 12)) & " an(s)",
IF( (MONTH(endDate__c) + (12 * (YEAR(endDate__c) - YEAR(startDate__c))) - MONTH(startDate__c)) > 0, TEXT(MONTH(endDate__c) + (12 * (YEAR(endDate__c) - YEAR(startDate__c))) - MONTH(startDate__c)) & " mois",
TEXT(endDate__c - startDate__c) & " jour(s)" ) )
CustomField.label: Durée du projet
